code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut stop = false
  while i < n and not stop
    # skip whitespace
    while i < n and is_ws(byte_or_zero(line, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i >= n
      i = n
    else
      # collect token
      mut start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws(byte_or_zero(line, i))
        i = i + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v < 0
        stop = true
      else
        sum = sum + v
      end
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{sum}")
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end
